canonical_source.sequence: structure + base + reaction -> merge_candidate_zones -> score_zone -> select_daily_majors

data_source_caveat: Requested 2026-05-04 currently resolves to the last local MarketArbiter candle on 2026-03-31. This decomposition reflects the local SQLite state, not a newer exchange candle. TradingView/vendor history differences should still be separated from selector logic.
